zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray"於1273年出生在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓時，她的父親Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale30歲，母親Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick19歲。她和Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine至少有1個兒子。她去世於1356年在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray"于1273年出生在英国苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓时，她的父亲Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale30岁，母亲Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick19岁。她和Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine至少有1个儿子。她去世于1356年在英国苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bruce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from a place in Normandy, probably from Brix (La Manche).
Altered form of French   Brousse  .

History: The son of the Domesday baron, a friend of David I of Scotland, was granted by him the Lordship of Annandale in 1124, and his second son Robert became the founder of the Scottish house of Bruce. — This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with its original form Brousse in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Brousse
meanings: French: topographic name for someone living in a scrubby area, from Old French bro(u)ce ‘thicket, brushwood’ (from Late Latin bruscia), or a habitational name from any of several places in France named Brousse. Compare Bruce and Brusse .

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Brewis
meanings: English:
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Briouze in Orne.
(Northumberland and Durham): topographic name or nickname from Middle English breuhous ‘brewery’ (literally ‘brew house’).

nameMeanings.name: aka
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Masao, Takashi, Kaoru, Makiko, Masahiko, Rieko, Shigeki, Shogo, Akio, Atsuhiko, Atsushi, Haruo.
Japanese: written 岡 or 丘 ‘hill’. It is found mostly in western Japan. In North America, the name could also be a shortening of longer names beginning with Oka-.
Albanian: metonymic occupational name from okë (definite form oka) ‘oke’, the name of an old measure of weight.

nameMeanings.name: "de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its altered form Bruce) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: Seton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

nameMeanings.name: Moray"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: variant of   McRae  .

variants.name: McRae
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of a patronymic from the Gaelic personal name Mac Raith ‘son of grace or prosperity’. Compare McGrath , the usual Irish form of this surname.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Polish: variant of   Lada  .
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray" was born in 1273, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, was 30 and her mother, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, was 19. She had at least 1 son with Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine. She died in 1356, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray" est née en 1273, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine. Elle est décédée en 1356, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray" 1273 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick 19. Sie hatte mit Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1356 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray" è nata il nel 1273 nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine. Morì nel 1356, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray"が1273年にイギリススコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandaleは30歳，母Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrickは19歳であった。彼女はSir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardineとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1356年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray"(이)가 1273년 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1356년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray" nasceu em 1273, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine. Ela faleceu em 1356, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray" родилась в 1273 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine. Она умерла в 1356 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Christian Bruce aka "de Bruce, de Seton, de Moray" nació en 1273, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sir Andrew Murray 2nd Laird of Tullibardine. Murió en 1356, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años.
